title: rosa calva
intro: Rosa calva is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae, commonly known as the dwarf wild rose. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Rosa calva include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Rosa calva can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to promote overall well-being and boost the immune system.
